query:
SELECT 
  u.id as userId,
  u.name as userName,
  u.phone as userPhone,
  u.roles as userRoles,
  u.isActive as userIsActive,
  p.id as partnerId,
  p.name as partnerName,
  p.phone as partnerPhone,
  p.isActive as partnerIsActive,
  pc.id as partnerCityId,
  pc.cityId,
  pc.contractStatus,
  c.name as cityName
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN partners p ON p.userId = u.id
LEFT JOIN partner_cities pc ON pc.partnerId = p.id
LEFT JOIN cities c ON c.id = pc.cityId
WHERE u.phone = '17370026'
ORDER BY u.id DESC;
